(remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-05-11T09:53:23.680+01:00 INFO 29252 --- [alouane-ayoub-exam-jee] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: create table app_role (role_name varchar(255) not null, primary key (role_name)) Hibernate: create table app_user (id bigint generated by default as identity, password varchar(255), username varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table app_user_roles (app_user_id bigint not null, roles_role_name varchar(255) not null) Hibernate: create table client (id bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255), nom varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table contract (type varchar(3) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, date_souscription date, date_validation date, duree integer, montant_cotisation float(53), statut varchar(255) check (statut in ('EN_COURS','VALIDE','RESILIE')), taux_couverture float(53), marque varchar(255), matricule varchar(255), modele varchar(255), adresse varchar(255), superficie float(53), type_logement varchar(255) check (type_logement in ('APPARTEMENT','MAISON','LOCAL_COMMERCIAL')), niveau_couverture varchar(255) check (niveau_couverture in ('BASIQUE','INTERMEDIAIRE','PREMIUM')), nombre_personnes integer, client_id bigint, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table payment (id bigint generated by default as identity, date date, montant float(53), type varchar(255) check (type in ('MENSUALITE','PAIEMENT_ANNUEL','PAIEMENT_EXCEPTIONNEL')), contract_id bigint, primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists app_user drop constraint if exists UK_3k4cplvh82srueuttfkwnylq0 Hibernate: alter table if exists app_user add constraint UK_3k4cplvh82srueuttfkwnylq0 unique (username) Hibernate: alter table if exists app_user_roles add constraint FKd9387jpe2r0vanlt99sigmxha foreign key (roles_role_name) references app_role Hibernate: alter table if exists app_user_roles add constraint FKkwxexnudtp5gmt82j0qtytnoe foreign key (app_user_id) references app_user Hibernate: alter table if exists contract add constraint FKlhq3p3xl25vvnfvyfc51ica0j foreign key (client_id) references client Hibernate: alter table if exists payment add constraint FKtosfjyexe2i8iwcap804fna4b foreign key (contract_id) references contract 2026-05-11T09:53:23.885+01:00 INFO 29252 --- [alouane-ayoub-exam-jee] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-05-11T09:53:25.266+01:00 WARN 29252 --- [alouane-ayoub-exam-jee] [ main] JpaBaseConfiguration$JpaWebConfiguration : spring.jpa.open-in-view is
